title: Board + tick wired to the gateway; Move onto an immediate agent list dispatches a real run

tests.summary: 3 passed (shouldAutoDispatch: immediate-agent only; engine dispatch advances + mints runId)

build.summary: engine/runner .mjs + runner.ts compile; next build green

e2e.summary: LIVE: gateway UP → move card to Plan → board POSTed the autothing-plan prompt (runDir + classification {code,T2-deep}) to /chat → card advanced to Implement, runId minted, iter 1. gateway DOWN → move → card stays on Plan/ok (waits), dispatched:false (no spam-park). Start with gateway down → 503.

codexReview.notes: r1 caught spam-park on gateway-down Move; fixed with gatewayReachable gating on Move + Start

codexPwTest.summary: codex sandbox cannot launch Chromium; live verification done via the repo Playwright + a stub-gateway integration against the real board server

by: vision review of the live board
designAudit.notes: card visibly moved To Do → Plan → Implement (iter 1/10) post-dispatch

video.notes: live board screenshot (card dispatched to Implement) + gateway-chat-POST-proof.log (the real autothing-plan POST)
